creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please remember that lzo2 has been enabled by default, too already before 3.2.0 update in the port. I do not share your opinion - the port should ideally use the defaults vendor wants. Vendor's autoconf enables both lzo2 and lz4 support by default if appropriate libraries are found.

Regarding approval by ports-secteam@, you must not forgot that cpio in passthrough mode is broken in the port (was a serious issue for FreeBSD base), I have fixed that by submitting patches upstream and it is already in base.
